description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style. The front features a paved driveway with two parked cars, a small front garden, and a prominent entryway with a dark overhang. The rear of the house opens onto a wooden deck with outdoor seating, a tree, and a fenced yard, providing a private outdoor space. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front and rear, with large rectangular panes allowing ample natural light. The side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a long brick wall extending from one side, likely serving as a privacy barrier. The property is enclosed by a combination of brick and wooden fencing, and the landscaping includes both paved and green areas.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat roof, paved driveway, and a private backyard deck with outdoor seating and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entryway with overhang, and a small front garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick privacy wall, driveway, and partial view of the backyard deck and tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, outdoor seating, tree, and fenced backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, deck, and the continuation of the privacy wall and driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a dark overhang, steps, and a paved approach, flanked by windows and a small garden.
